creator: ighighi@gmail.com
text:
Hi!

The SYNOPSIS line for gunzip lacks the 'k' that was added to gzip.

Note: The -k option is used by both...

On 5/28/07, Xin LI <delphij@freebsd.org> wrote:
>
> Synopsis: [patch] gzip support for -k option as used by bzip2(1)
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->patched
> State-Changed-By: delphij
> State-Changed-When: Mon May 28 08:21:06 UTC 2007
> State-Changed-Why:
> Feature added to BSD gzip.  Pending MFC.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=103006
>
